title: Single Cell Analysis Plan, Execution, And Repair
goal: Design and execute or scaffold a reproducible scRNA-seq analysis, use referenced slots/logs/figures/tables, repair failures, and deliver notebook plus report refs.

rounds.prompt: 为一个公开或 fixture scRNA-seq 数据集设计疾病相关细胞类型分析：QC、聚类、marker gene、差异表达和可视化。
acceptanceChecks: does not invent unavailable raw FASTQ processing

rounds.prompt: ※1 只使用这个 UIManifest 数据表/输入 slot，不要读取其它输入；给出执行计划更新。

referenceOps.source: UIManifest data table or input slot

acceptanceChecks: prompt carries marker but not full slot payload

rounds.prompt: 运行或生成可复现任务代码；如果缺依赖或失败，请保留日志 refs。
acceptanceChecks: failure is not disguised as success

rounds.prompt: ※2 根据这段失败日志自主修复并重跑一次；说明修复改变了什么。
acceptanceChecks: repair request quotes or summarizes selected failure

rounds.prompt: ※3 这两个 cluster 是否应该合并？请基于被点选的图和已有指标回答。
acceptanceChecks: uncertainty and required validation are stated

rounds.prompt: ※4 解释这些 marker gene 行支持的细胞类型注释依据。
基于已有 refs 追加差异表达和富集分析，不重跑无关步骤；输出 notebook、figure refs、marker table 和结论报告。
acceptanceChecks: final report lists repair and reference effects

browser: screenshot of final notebook or report preview
computerUse: click marker chip to highlight source

blockerTemplate: Record missing dataset/dependency/backend, visible failure log, and which rounds were completed as UI-only smoke.
